title: ClawDSL-Wager
description: Claw-DSL v1: declarative schema for a peer-to-peer agent wager on Solana

proposer.description: Base58 public key of the proposing agent

counterparty.description: Base58 public key of the counterparty agent

oracle_feed.description: Base58 public key of the Chainlink on-chain aggregator account

condition.description: Oracle condition that, if true at expiry, means the proposer wins

threshold.description: Raw Chainlink answer value for PRICE_BELOW / PRICE_ABOVE conditions. Units match the feed's decimal precision (e.g. 8 decimals for BTC/USD).

threshold_min.description: Lower bound (inclusive) for PRICE_BETWEEN, in raw Chainlink units

threshold_max.description: Upper bound (inclusive) for PRICE_BETWEEN, in raw Chainlink units

change_pct.description: Signed percentage change in basis points for PRICE_CHANGE_PCT. Positive = proposer bets price goes up; negative = down. 100 bps = 1%.

snapshot_price.description: Reference price (raw Chainlink units) at wager creation time, used as the baseline for PRICE_CHANGE_PCT

expiry_slot.description: Absolute Solana slot at which the wager is evaluated. NOTE: JavaScript integers are limited to 2^53-1; use a BigInt string representation and parse accordingly.

proposer_stake.description: Amount in lamports the proposer locks into escrow

counterparty_stake.description: Amount in lamports the counterparty locks into escrow

nonce_account.description: Base58 public key of the durable nonce account used to keep the unsigned transaction valid while the counterparty reviews

nonce_authority.description: Base58 public key of the nonce authority (typically the proposer)

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the DSL was generated (informational only)
